set.caption: Figure 8.1: At zero temperature, the properties of a system are determined by the ground state. At finite temperature, we must average the properties of the system over an ensemble of states, weighted with the Boltzmann probability weight e^{-beta E_lambda}/Z.

overrides.reason: Raw PDF page 254 shows Fig. 8.1 spanning the split visual blocks body[13]/body[14].正文 body[1] explicitly cites Figure 8.1, but only Figure 8.2 had been backfilled. Promote body[14] to the semantic Figure 8.1 anchor and keep body[13] excluded as the companion panel.
